## GPTs

## - [LTX 2.3 Ingredients Sheet Builder](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a33363e05a48191b4dee3a993cbc6b1-ltx-2-3-ingredients-sheet-builder)
- Give it your idea or any user input and it will create the ref sheet


## - [LTX 2.3 Image 2 Structured Prompt Builder](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-6a33397cb2f081918f8695e89d18dabf-ltx-2-3-image-2-structured-prompt-builder)
- Give it the ref sheet the prev. GPT created and it will create a Prompt.

nodes.title: LTX models used in  this workflow
widgets_values:
## 📦 Required Models & Assets

### 🧠 Diffusion Model
- **ltx-2.3-distilled gguf models**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Abiray/LTX-2.3-22B-DISTILLED-1.1-GGUF/tree/main)

---

### 🎥 Video & 🔊 Audio VAE
- **LTX2.3_video_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
- **LTX2.3_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae)

---

### 📝Clip Text / Instruction Model
- **gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Sikaworld1990/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition-Ltx-2/resolve/main/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition.safetensors)

---

### 🔤 Clip Text Encoder / Embeddings
- **ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/text_encoders)

---

### 🔍 Spatial Upscaler
- **ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/prince-canuma/LTX-2.3-distilled/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors)

---

### Ingredients LoRa
- **LTX 2.3 Ingredients loRa
 🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-22b-IC-LoRA-Ingredients/tree/main)

---

### 🔍 Ingredients LoRa
- **ltx-2.3-22b-ic-lora-ingredients-0.9.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-22b-IC-LoRA-Ingredients/tree/main)

---

### 🔍 Omni-NFT loRA
- **LTX-2.3-OmniNFT-RL-Lora_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/loras/LTX-2.3-OmniNFT-RL-Lora_bf16.safetensors)

---

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── ltx-2.3-distilled_1.1-Q6_k.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── ltx-2.3-text_projection_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── gemma Model
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      ├── LTX2.3_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── LTX2.3_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│          └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors

```

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
Top left (portrait subject):
a close-up portrait of a young woman with black hair in messy high pigtails, pink streaks, blunt bangs, hoop earrings, layered silver necklaces, and a pink graphic crop top with a white cat motif. she has glossy makeup, winged eyeliner, a calm slightly defiant expression, and soft skin texture under magenta and blue arcade lighting. shallow depth of field, blurred neon machines behind her.

Top center (character outfit turnaround):
full-body front, side, three-quarter, and back views of the same punk arcade-inspired character on a neutral gray background. she wears a pink cropped cat graphic shirt, black pleated mini skirt with chains and studded belt, mismatched thigh-high socks in pink stripes and black ripped fabric, chunky black-and-pink platform boots, bracelets, chokers, and twin pigtails with pink accents. the mood is confident and rebellious, with the outfit clearly shown from multiple angles.

Top right (arcade cabinet design views):
front, side, back, and angled views of a worn black-and-pink arcade cabinet decorated with white cat graphics, bows, scratches, chipped paint, and scuffed edges. the cabinet has a small screen, pink controls, black coin door, and distressed metal and painted wood surfaces on a gray studio background.

Middle left (spiked bat prop):
a horizontal black baseball bat with a wrapped dark handle, distressed pink markings, white cat graphics, metal spikes, scuffs, scratches, and worn paint. the prop has a gritty handmade punk texture, shown in side view on a gray background.

Middle right (plush keychain design views):
front, side, back, and angled views of a small white cat plush keychain with a pink bow, pink skull shirt, black straps, metal clip ring, dirt marks, worn fabric, and stitched facial details. the views show the plush as cute but weathered, matching the black-and-pink punk theme.

Bottom left (arcade character scene):
the young woman stands with crossed arms beside a pink-and-black cat-themed arcade cabinet inside a dark neon arcade. she wears the same punk outfit, framed by rows of glowing machines, magenta and cyan lights, patterned carpet, stools, and a moody nightlife atmosphere. her pose feels guarded and self-assured.

Bottom center (arcade exterior storefront):
a rainy nighttime street corner with a neon-lit arcade storefront, glowing pink and blue signage, wet pavement reflections, posters, windows filled with arcade machines, and urban darkness around the building. the scene feels cinematic, saturated, and slightly gritty.

Bottom right (arcade interior aisle):
a wide view down an arcade aisle lined with many cabinets on both sides, glossy reflective floor, overhead industrial ceiling, neon star and gamepad signs, pink and blue light pools, and a deep perspective toward the back wall. the mood is immersive, nostalgic, and electric.

Target Description:
a neon-soaked punk arcade world in black, hot pink, cyan, and violet, centered on a young woman with messy black twin pigtails streaked pink, layered silver jewelry, winged eyeliner, a pink cat graphic crop top, black pleated skirt with chains, mismatched striped and ripped thigh-high socks, and chunky platform boots. the camera begins in a tight close-up on her calm defiant face as magenta arcade light glints across her earrings and glossy makeup, then slowly pulls back to reveal her leaning beside a battered black-and-pink cat-themed arcade cabinet covered in chipped paint, scuffs, bow graphics, and glowing controls. nearby, a distressed spiked bat and a worn plush cat keychain echo the same cute-but-dangerous style. rain taps outside the neon storefront while wet pavement reflects pink and blue signs; inside, rows of cabinets hum, buttons click, coin slots clatter, and distant electronic game sounds layer under a low synth pulse. use cinematic shallow depth of field, slow dolly movement, reflective floors, smoky atmosphere, saturated neon bloom, gritty texture, and a rebellious late-night mood.
